title: Problem opening saved xlsx file with color theme 1
author: jalembke
body:
Is anyone else having a problem opening the saved xlsx file?  I was able to trace it back to the fact that the library sets a default font style with color theme = 1.  Here is the snip from styles-xform.js

https://github.com/guyonroche/exceljs/blob/1a8d25044534e87958384a2befc7a2f85b3822ad/lib/xlsx/xform/style/styles-xform.js#L105

It seems to work just fine if I change this to remove the theme 1 and use an argb value of black:
this._addFont({size: 11, color: { argb: 'FF000000' }, name: 'Calibri', family: 2, scheme: 'minor'});

comments.author: jalembke
comments.body:
Ok dug into this a bit more and it appears that the workbook model has a themes object but the object is empty so the xlsx.write when it calls addThemes doesn't add any theme to the xlsx zip file.  

https://github.com/guyonroche/exceljs/blob/1a8d25044534e87958384a2befc7a2f85b3822ad/lib/xlsx/xlsx.js#L459

The model.themes object exists but has no values.  I believe that always adding the theme1Xml regardless of the values in model.themes should fix the problem.  Thoughts on this?
